examples: Some things to remember odoriferous memory is better than the voice and image.
An odoriferous yellow oil found in orange flowers and used in perfumery and as a flavoring.
Bouquet. Odoriferous quality of a wine, particularly the odour of fine wines acquired during aging.
Perhaps it's an extreme reaction to last year's Cult of the Sockless (resulting in odoriferous and prematurely damaged loafers).
